content.text: Perfect! Now let me read the main CSS files - index.css and App.css - to find the CSS custom properties:

Perfect! Here's what I found:

## CSS Variables File

**Main CSS Variables Location:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\index.css`

### All CSS Custom Properties (--var declarations):

**Light Theme (default `:root`):**
```css
--bg-primary: #ffffff
--bg-secondary: rgb(250, 250, 250)
--bg-hover: rgb(245, 245, 245)
--bg-elevated: rgb(255, 255, 255)
--bg-backdrop: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.23)
--bg-backdrop-heavy: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.575)
--bg-overlay: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.089)
--bg-pill: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)
--bg-glass: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.23)
--bg-glass-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35)
--text-primary: rgb(4, 20, 29)
--text-heading: rgb(15, 23, 30)
--text-secondary: rgb(75, 75, 75)
--text-body: rgb(100, 100, 100)
--text-muted: rgb(130, 130, 130)
--text-faint: rgb(150, 150, 150)
--text-separator: rgb(190, 190, 190)
--border-light: rgba(151, 151, 151, 0.168)
--border-card: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)
--shadow-card: 2px 2px 10px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.182)
--shadow-modal: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)
--accent-purple: rgb(94, 66, 255)
--accent-dark: rgb(4, 20, 29)
--accent-dark-hover: rgb(16, 56, 79)
--icon-default: #5e5e5eff
--icon-view: #00000044
--icon-view-count: #00000099
--font-serif: "Lora", Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif
--font-ui: "Inter", "Nunito", sans-serif

--accent-sage: #6B8F71
--accent-amber: #F59E0B
--color-danger: #DC2626
--color-danger-bg: rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.08)
--color-success: #16A34A
--color-success-bg: rgba(22, 163, 74, 0.08)
--shadow-card-sm: 0 1px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)
--shadow-dropdown: 0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)
--bg-selection: rgba(94, 66, 255, 0.06)
--bg-selection-active: rgba(94, 66, 255, 0.12)
--loader-color: #2D2D2D
```

**Dark Theme (`[data-theme="dark"]`):**
The dark theme overrides most of these variables with darker versions. Key changes include background colors becoming darker (rgb(18, 18, 18) etc.), text becoming lighter (rgb(225, 225, 225)), and accent colors adjusted for dark mode visibility.

## Framer Motion

**Status:** YES - Framer Motion IS installed in the project

From `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\package.json` (line 23):
```json
"framer-motion": "^12.23.23"
```

The project uses Framer Motion version 12.23.23 for animations, which aligns with the memory note mentioning "Framer Motion animations" in the architecture.
